name: New England Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 cup light cream or undiluted milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon in a deep, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Cook on FULL POWER, covered with a paper towel, for 4 minutes, or until bacon is crisp.
3. Remove cooked bacon with a slotted spoon and crumble it. Set aside. Reserve drippings in the casserole.
4. Drain liquid from clams and add to bacon drippings. Set clams aside.
5. Add potatoes and onions to the casserole.
6. Cook on FULL POWER, covered, in the microwave oven for 8 minutes or until vegetables are tender; stir occasionally.
7. Blend flour into the vegetable mixture.
8. Gradually stir in milk until smooth.
9. Cook on FULL POWER, uncovered, in the microwave oven for 4 minutes or until thickened and smooth.
10. Stir in cream, salt, pepper, and reserved clams and sherry. Cook on FULL POWER, uncovered, in the microwave oven for 4 minutes.
Garnish with crumbled bacon and chives.
